creator: blacktravelpin
caption:
⚠️ These are official RTA fines 👇

🫧 Chewing gum = Fine AED100 (~$27)
🌯🥤 eating or drinking = Fine AED100
🚷 Sitting in the wrong section = Fine AED100
👣 Feet on the seat = Fine AED100
🐶 Bringing animals (except guide dogs) = AED100 fine
😴 Sleeping in Metro stations or shelters = AED300 fine
🍾 Carrying alcohol = AED500 fine
💳 Using an expired/invalid Nol card = AED200 fine
🚫 Entering restricted or non-passenger areas = AED100 fine
🔥 Carrying hazardous items (weapons, flammable materials, sharp tools) = AED1,000 (~$275)
🔴 Pressing the emergency button without reason = AED2,000 fine

Save this before your Dubai trip 🇦🇪

👇 Which one surprised you the most?
